chunks.text:
Queen of Sands

Queen of Sands is a Dubai real estate boutique agency with $100M+ in closed deals and 250+ successful transactions, specializing in high-return investment opportunities.

Tagline: Trusted Boutique Agency

Services:
- Property investment consulting
- Residential solutions for expatriates
- Off-plan property sales
- 1-on-1 advisory

Key Areas: Dubai, UAE.

Contact Information:
- Phone: +971 50 259 2482
- Email: info@queenofsands.com
- Website: https://queenofsands.com/
- Address: 3211 The Burlington Tower, Business Bay, Dubai, UAE

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for Queen of Sands — a real estate agency in Dubai, UAE.

Company: Queen of Sands
Location: 3211 The Burlington Tower, Business Bay, Dubai, UAE
Phone: +971 50 259 2482
Email: info@queenofsands.com
Website: https://queenofsands.com/

Services: - Property investment consulting
- Residential solutions for expatriates
- Off-plan property sales
- 1-on-1 advisory

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on the information above and knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly
- If unsure, suggest contacting the company directly at +971 50 259 2482 or info@queenofsands.com
- Respond in the same language the user writes in
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail needed)
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to **Queen of Sands**! How can I help you find your perfect property?
